mapper.select: SELECT id, biz_no, target_user_id, status, model_config_id, prompt_template_id, input_param, word_limit_target, retry_count, locked_at, locked_by, lease_until, failed_reason, completed_at, retention_days, tenant_id, is_deleted, created_at, updated_at, created_by, updated_by FROM a_generation_task WHERE status = 0 AND (lease_until IS NULL OR lease_until < NOW(3)) ORDER BY created_at ASC LIMIT #{limit} FOR UPDATE SKIP LOCKED
mapper.update: UPDATE a_generation_task SET status = 0, locked_at = NULL, locked_by = NULL, lease_until = NULL, retry_count = retry_count + 1 WHERE status = 1 AND (lease_until IS NULL OR lease_until < #{now})
mapper.select: SELECT id FROM a_generation_task WHERE status IN (2, 3) AND completed_at IS NOT NULL AND retention_days IS NOT NULL AND DATE_ADD(completed_at, INTERVAL retention_days DAY) < #{now} ORDER BY completed_at ASC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM a_generation_task t LEFT JOIN u_user u ON u.id = t.target_user_id AND u.is_deleted = 0 WHERE t.is_deleted = 0 AND t.status = #{status}
AND (t.biz_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR u.nickname LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
